__fixture__.name: partial_chronology_export_with_declared_gap
__fixture__.scenario: A chronology export preview for a support bundle that stitches together one hour of local history plus one segment imported from a remote agent that went offline mid-session. The partial_chronology_segment_record covers the full window, carries segment_completeness_class = complete_with_declared_gaps, and declares one gap under gap_reason_class = remote_runtime_disconnected with a non-zero gap_rows_suppressed_count. segment_completeness_label explicitly says 'Partial capture — 1 gap declared' so the export reader sees the segment is not complete. Because the segment composes imported remote-agent content, segment_import_origin_class is remote_agent_export and segment_import_declared carries the upstream window.

declared_gaps.gap_reason_label: Remote agent disconnected for six minutes; rows in this window were not received.
